description_long: This is a white, polygonal plate featuring a whole roasted chicken with two drumsticks, accompanied by several small round potatoes and a few green peas. The chicken is rendered with a golden-brown, slightly glossy skin, and the drumsticks are capped with white paper frills. The potatoes are clustered together on one side of the plate, while the peas are scattered in small groups. The plate itself is faceted, giving it a stylized, geometric appearance, and is large enough to comfortably hold the entire meal. The overall presentation suggests a festive or hearty meal, with the food items arranged for visual appeal.
description: A faceted white plate holds a roasted chicken with drumsticks, small potatoes, and green peas, arranged in a visually appealing manner.
description_view_0: The front view shows the chicken with both drumsticks visible, potatoes on the left, and peas in the foreground.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the drumsticks pointing forward, with peas more prominent and potatoes partially obscured.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the chicken, with potatoes on the right and fewer peas visible.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the chicken's back, with potatoes in the foreground and peas to the right.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is shown on a flat, white surface with no additional context.
